title: Kangaroo shaped objective scaffold added
summary: Kangaroo now has an optional scaffolded search objective for route-progress experiments. The inner optimizer can use a shaped objective that combines real reward with ladder-route progress signals, while the final run best is still selected and reported by real game reward.

context.motivation: Several reward-only Kangaroo runs recovered at most the shallow first 200-point reward and did not reliably progress beyond it. Quentin's feedback pointed to the need for parametric intermediate perception and route checks, especially ladder alignment and post-first-reward behavior.
context.scope: Kangaroo-only, optional, experimental. Existing reward-only runs and other games keep the original real-reward objective.

search_objective_components: real game reward remains the base term
bonus for reaching the first 200-point route event
bonus for upward progress from the starting platform
bonus for emitting UP-like actions only when they produce meaningful upward movement
bonus for progress after the first reward
penalty for scoreless no-fire policies that climb or move but never use the known useful first-reward branch
penalty for scoreless excessive punch behavior
penalty for repeated lower-platform punch farming without upward progress
implementation.reward_integrity_rule: The shaped objective is used only as a search scaffold. The outer loop still records real avg_return, real player score, real win rate, and chooses the final best policy by avg_return.

commands: API-free shaped evaluator smoke test on kangaroo_20260501_211358_fresh_s20260501/policy_v2.py
API-free reward-only evaluator smoke test on the same policy
secret scan for API-key patterns under scripts/llm_optimization

interpretation: This is a stronger next direction than another reward-only Kangaroo run because it gives CMA-ES feedback before the sparse game reward changes.
It does not make Kangaroo solved, and it does not turn shaped score into thesis performance evidence.
If the shaped run improves route behavior, it can be used as method-development evidence and later checked again under real reward-only standardized evaluation.
If it fails, that is also useful evidence: Kangaroo may require explicit staged perception subtasks or should be paused in favor of broader game coverage.

rq_mapping.RQ1: Creates a route-progress scaffold to test whether LeGPS can escape the first-reward plateau on Kangaroo, while preserving real-reward reporting for final success claims.
rq_mapping.RQ2: Directly targets a known shortcut risk by penalizing lower-platform punch farming without upward progress.
rq_mapping.RQ4: Keeps CMA-ES central, but changes what CMA-ES optimizes for this Kangaroo experiment, so results must be labeled as shaped-objective evidence rather than pure reward-only evidence.

recommended_next_steps: Run a fresh Kangaroo outer loop with --kangaroo-shaped-objective and inspect both shaped objective and real avg_return.
Render/debug the best shaped-run policy and check whether any score improvement comes from real route progress rather than lower-platform punch farming.
Do not promote Kangaroo unless a candidate passes standardized real-reward evaluation and behavioral inspection.
Keep shaped-objective Kangaroo evidence separate from canonical reward-only results.
